title: mowt #4131
definition:
1) to totter, shake, slip
    1a) (Qal) to totter, shake, slip
    1b) (Niphal) to be shaken, be moved, be overthrown
    1c) (Hiphil) to dislodge, let fall, drop
    1d) (Hithpael) to be greatly shaken
nasbUsage:
